gamerule.builders-shulkers.inventory_acc: Open shulker boxes from the inventory
Allow right-clicking a shulker box in the inventory to open and rearrange its contents.
gamerule.builders-shulkers.pocket_build: Pocket-Build from a held shulker box
Allow Pocket-Build: place or use a held shulker box's contents straight from the hotbar, without putting the box down.
